'''Band-Aid''' is an item that speeds up your dog’s [[Basic Core Stats#Modes|Injured Mode]].

The number of band-aids needed for an injured dog to stand up is 8.

{{Item
| image = Bandaid.png
| id = bandaid
| type = Utilities
| stackable = 64
| Description = - Use 8 Band-Aids to help your incapacitated dog stand up!
- A Bed (Vanilla or DTN) is needed to further increase recovery speed!
}}

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| Paper <br>+ Koji
+ Bone Meal
| [[File:Band aid crafting.png]]
|}

== Usage ==
* '''<code>Right click</code>''' on your injured dog to use the item.

== Trivia ==
* It was added to DTN 1.13.0.<gallery>
File:Band aid render light.png|0-3 Band-Aids
File:Band aid render medium.png|4-7 Band-Aids
File:Band aid render full.png|8 Band-Aids (max)
</gallery>
